summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Services Console feature with Start/Stop/Health functionality, editable commands, and menu bar integration. Successfully tested backend APIs and frontend UI interactions.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 521 error due to backend connection issues, expected 502 for LM Studio offline
flaky_endpoints.workaround: LM Studio integration gracefully handles offline state in frontend

ui_bugs.issue: Services list occasionally shows 'Refreshing...' state temporarily on initial load

integration_issues.issue: Model status remains 'Scanning models...' and doesn't update to show offline state clearly

passed_tests: Services page loads with three service cards (ComfyUI, LM Studio, Stable Diffusion)
Services list API returns status and fields for all services
Save service settings updates backend successfully
Start/Stop endpoints work and return proper success messages
Menu bar renders correctly with all dropdowns functional
Navigation includes Services and all pages accessible
Start/Stop buttons are clickable and functional
LM Studio base URL set to http://100.77.24.8:1234
Menu navigation to Services through Tools menu works
